---
title: "stabilizer.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\scripts\empire\stabilizer.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.55
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.22
---

## Intent
The `stabilizer.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on EmpireStabilizer, __init__, wait_for_idle. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via EmpireStabilizer, __init__, wait_for_idle. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `EmpireStabilizer`
- `__init__`
- `wait_for_idle`
